empty.noConfigurableFields: This capability has no configurable fields.
empty.noHealthChecks: No health checks available for this capability.
empty.noCommands: This capability does not expose slash commands.

help.fileSettings: File Capability settings apply only to /read-file. General upload limits are configured in General.
help.httpSettings: HTTP settings apply only to /fetch-url. It auto-detects supported text, HTML, JSON, and image responses and does not affect chat uploads.

max_local_audio_read_size_mb.label: Max local audio read size
max_local_audio_read_size_mb.description: Maximum local audio file size for /read-file audio results.

max_local_video_read_size_mb.label: Max local video read size
max_local_video_read_size_mb.description: Maximum local video file size for /read-file video outputs.

enable_read_file_command.label: Enable /read-file
enable_read_file_command.description: Enable /read-file for text, image, audio, and video files.

permissions.filesystemRead: Can read local files from configured allowed directories
permissions.networkHttp: Can make HTTP GET requests without private browser cookies
